type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: In 2015, commissioning took place in two stages: first three units in January and last two units in August. In 2016, all units run throughout the year, which means that emissions were higher compared to 2015.

comments.comment: Commissioning in 2015 took place in two stages: first three units in January and last two units in August. All units run through 2016, which means that emissions are higher compared to 2015.
